title: Sanji and Zeff’s Starvation Flashback
description: On pages 1–4, Sanji’s past with Zeff is revealed through their starvation on a rock, explaining the debt that binds him to the Baratie.
scene: The flashback strips away the noise of battle and focuses on hunger, sacrifice, and the dream of creating a restaurant where no one is denied food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That ship is... It's the cook pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He came back from Grand Line!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: y-you must be the captain of these pirates, red-legg zeff.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: W-what do you need from us...?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Take all their valuables, down to the last penny!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cap'n! If we don't leave soon, we'll get caught up in the storm!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm not just going to sit still and be killed by those pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I was... just a little hungr...

summary: This part gives emotional meaning to Sanji’s choices: Zeff’s sacrifice explains why feeding the hungry is sacred to him.
